title: diff
html:
diff

File Read

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

diff --line-format=%L /dev/null /path/to/input-file

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

diff --recursive /path/to/empty-dir /path/to/input-dir/
excerpt: diff File Read Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged diff --line-format=%L /dev/null /path/to/input-file Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged diff --recursive /path/to/empty-dir /path/to/input-dir/
